name: Mashed Potato Puffs
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the mashed potatoes, butter, salt, and white pepper in a bowl and mix well.
2. Add the choux paste and mix until evenly distributed.
3. Heat the corn oil to 360 degrees Fahrenheit.
4. Drop spoonfuls of the dough into the hot oil.
5. Fry the puffs until they are puffed up and lightly browned, about 1-2 minutes per side.
6. Remove the puffs from the oil using a slotted spoon and place them on a cooling rack to drain excess oil.
7. Blot the puffs with paper towels to remove any remaining grease.
8. Keep the puffs warm in a slow oven until serving.
9. Serve hot.
